subcategory: Animated hamburger menu with slide-out sidebar
use_cases: Mobile-friendly hamburger menu with smooth slide-out animation
Sidebar navigation with staggered menu item reveals
Interactive overlay navigation with hover and tap feedback
Color-coded menu items with gradient accent colors
Framer Motion-powered animated navigation for web applications
ai_summary: An animated hamburger menu component featuring a slide-out sidebar with staggered menu item animations using Framer Motion. Includes hover scale and tap feedback on menu items, colorful gradient accents, and smooth open/close transitions. The navigation uses motion variants for coordinated animations and works responsively across desktop and mobile platforms.
